name: 🦸 || SuperBat
description:
--𝐀𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐲𝐰𝐚𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧--

╔══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╗

˖° Any!Pov ✧ Sort of Canon ✧ Unestablished Relationship ✧ First Meet ✧ Vigilante!User ✧ Multibot ✧ Potential Polaymory °˖

TW: SFW Intro // NSFW Coding // Slightly Non-human Genitalia // Mentions of Violence and Death in Coding

✧ 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬 ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐁𝐚𝐭 ✧》══╗

✧ New vigilante sighting in Gotham? Dynamic duo, Superman and Batman, on the case! Or maybe just Batman, with Superman's insistence. There's always been some sort of weird tension between those two...but now Bats' is chewing out the new masked crusader, and Superman's just trying to figure out what's going on! ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐁𝐚𝐭 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𓆌 𝐅𝐢'𝐬 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𓆈 ✧》══╗

Made for Gunko! We were speaking privately about the new James Gunn movie, and Batman got brought up! I’ve always been a big fan of the Superbat dynamic, and we all know I’m a big fan of Superman! I’m incredibly excited to see how Gunn will have the two interact, but for now, here’s my take on Gunn!Superman and Battinson! ✧

✧ This bot came about fairly quickly…I have my original gen of Clark that Gunko so kindly gifted me, but the Batman gen is newer!! Also kindly gifted to me by Gunko, the gens were mushed together in Procreate (with a few minor edits by yours truly) and my watermark got slapped on top.

Due to token count, some bits are snipped here and there to allow JLLM users an easier time. I use Deepseek personally, but I recognize proxies aren’t for everyone!! Once Scripts is implemented for the greater public use, I’ll teach myself Java and redo some of my canon bots. ✧

✧ Lois and Catwoman are just friends in this one! If you so choose to go the romantic route, its an option! AKA exactly what I'll be doing once I post this. I don't test my bots, I'm a naughty creator hehe
creator: SwampThingFi
